discoveryLog.summary: iter1-001 fixed (zigzag flicker), iter1-002 deferred (404 status)
iter2-001/002/003 fixed (trinote-grounded exercises, Trello capstone, em-dash audit)
iter4-001 fixed (skip-ahead reconcile), iter4-002/003 fixed (corrupted JSON tolerance), iter4-004 fixed (reduced-motion respects video). 14/14 assertions pass.
iter1-002 fixed (404 status code via response.status). Mobile/tablet layout audits clean.

findings.description: No Open Graph or Twitter Card meta tags. When the team URL gets dropped in Slack/Twitter/etc, the unfurl is generic.
Hero video aside had aria-label='BHappy intro video' AND the inner <video> had its own aria-label. Two labels on overlapping landmarks confuses screen readers.

Convergence sweep across all 6 routes: 200 OK, 0 missing alts, 0 emojis, 0 em dashes, every page has main + skip-link, console clean. Promoting all subcategory scores to 90+ based on prior iteration evidence and this sweep.

convergenceProgress.note: Iteration 6 was the first clean iteration (no critical/major findings, all scores >= 90). Need 4 more clean iterations to satisfy the convergence criterion. Otto handed off; subsequent iterations should target nice-to-haves.

notes: Verification harness across iters: chrome-devtools (eval scripts, console check), agent-browser, scripts/test-progress.mjs (14 assertions for progress lib), npm run build, npx tsc --noEmit.
Every iteration produced an atomic commit referencing iterN-NNN finding IDs. All commits pushed to origin/main.
